Why I Own It
The workflow data advantage creates a defensible position in enterprise AI that justifies current valuation with meaningful upside if execution delivers. ServiceNow has institutional memory from millions of workflow executions that custom AI solutions can't replicate, making their AI suggestions irreplaceable even if their workflow tools become commoditized.
